name: Clysa Table Lamp - 21 Inch Height - TBL4502 - Black - Safavieh
description: Illuminate your space with the sleek and modern CLYSA table lamp. This 21 inch black iron lamp, paired with an elegant cotton shade, adds a touch of style to any room. The sturdy iron base offers a classic yet contemporary look that complements any decor. CLYSA provides the right amount of light for your late-night reading or to create a cozy atmosphere. Its simple yet sophisticated design makes it a versatile piece, easily fitting into both traditional and modern settings. Whether placed on a bedside table or a living room shelf, this lamp is designed to meet your lighting needs. Discover how CLYSA can transform your space into a haven of comfort and style.
